hero.title: Your natural retreat in the heart of Yaracuy
hero.subtitle: Enjoy the tranquility of Yurubí National Park with all the comforts of a comfortable hotel

rooms.title: Dream Rooms
rooms.subtitle: A haven of peace designed for your maximum comfort and deep rest
rooms.interestInfo: All our rooms feature privileged views of the Yurubí National Park, state-of-the-art air conditioning, and premium 400-thread-count linens.

services.title: Yurubí Experiences
services.subtitle: Every detail is designed to transform your stay into an unforgettable memory
services.restaurantDesc: Flavors that tell stories. Yaracuy gastronomy with an international touch and views of our tropical gardens.
services.poolDesc: Dive into crystal-clear waters surrounded by lush vegetation. The perfect place to disconnect from the world.
services.meetingRoomDesc: Versatile spaces equipped with cutting-edge technology to make your corporate meetings flawless.
services.barDesc: The ideal meeting point. Enjoy drinks designed to refresh your senses in a sophisticated atmosphere.

booking.title: Book a Room
booking.successBody: You will receive a confirmation email shortly. Our team will review your request.
booking.errorGeneric: An error occurred. Please try again.
booking.noAvailability: No availability for the selected dates. Please contact us directly.

meetingRoom.title: Events & Business
meetingRoom.subtitle: We offer versatile halls perfect for corporate meetings, conferences, or social celebrations.
meetingRoom.corporateDesc: Spaces designed for productivity: from intimate boardrooms to grand auditoriums for conventions.
meetingRoom.socialDesc: The perfect stage for weddings, anniversaries, and social events with our historical expertise.
meetingRoom.cateringDesc: Coffee breaks, executive lunches, and personalized gala banquets for your guests.

reviews.title: Guest Reviews
reviews.subtitle: What our guests say
reviews.thankYou: Thank you for your review! It will be reviewed by our team.

location.title: In the Heart of Nature
location.subtitle: Strategically located at the foot of Yurubí National Park, where fresh air and birdsong are your best neighbors.
location.address: Final Avenida La Fuente, San Felipe, Yaracuy, Venezuela
location.interestLocation: A few minutes from the city center but far enough to guarantee absolute peace.

contact.title: Let's Start Planning Your Visit
contact.subtitle: Your perfect escape is just a message away
contact.name: Name
contact.successMessage: Message received! We will be in touch very soon.
contact.motivatingText: We want you to live the Yurubí experience. If you have questions about our rates, special services, or just want to say hello, we are ready to assist you with our characteristic warmth.

promotions.title: Unmissable Opportunities
promotions.subtitle: Guarantee the best price and exclusive benefits by booking directly with us
promotions.noPromotions: We will have new surprises for you soon. Stay tuned!

about.title: A retreat with history in the heart of Yurubí Park
about.description: Since 1957, Hotel Río Yurubí has been the meeting point between Yaracuy's tradition and contemporary hospitality. We were born next to the river that gives us our name, steps away from Yurubí National Park, a place where mountain freshness and urban comfort coexist in perfect harmony.
about.content1: For almost seven decades, we have kept our doors open under the care of a family that has made hospitality their vocation. Thanks to this legacy, our guests enjoy a warm, honest, and consistent service.
about.content2: Our spaces preserve the original aesthetics that captivate those seeking authenticity. Wood, stone, and granite floors create an atmosphere designed for every moment to be lived unhurriedly. Here, every corner tells a story... and invites you to create your own.
about.subtitle3: Hospitality for every type of trip
about.content3: Whether to rest, work, or celebrate, you will find facilities designed for your well-being.
about.content4: Hotel Río Yurubí is part of San Felipe's social fabric. We are a historical reference for the community and an active ally in the state's development.
about.cta: Discover a classic that renews itself for you.

hospitality.rooms: Spacious and silent rooms offering deep and restorative rest.
hospitality.restaurant: A restaurant with local trajectory that connects you with the authentic flavors of Yaracuy.
hospitality.recreation: Pool, bar, and an African-inspired lounge, created to pause the day and reconnect with yourself.
hospitality.events: We offer versatile halls with capacity for 15 to 350 people, perfect for corporate meetings, conferences, or social celebrations.
